raw_consumer_statement: American Express is XXXX to XXXX customers like me. They have indefinitely postponed resolving this dispute multiple times and claim they are investigating it when its a very simple issue. I didnt receive the product I ordered and sent them photo proof that what was inside the box I received there was no product I ordered. They keep postponing this dispute and say they are working on it but I still dont have my full refund or full credit back. Despicable credit card company. This is for chargeback dispute XXXX with American Express XXXX
